mapper.sql: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.real_name, c.introduction, c.expertise, c.certification, c.rating, c.consultation_count, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM fortune_consultant c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id
mapper.select:
AND c.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%') AND c.expertise LIKE CONCAT('%', #{expertise}, '%') AND c.status = #{status}
ORDER BY c.rating DESC, c.consultation_count DESC
WHERE c.status = '1' ORDER BY c.rating DESC, c.consultation_count DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fortune_consultant (user_id, real_name, introduction, expertise, certification, rating, consultation_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{realName}, #{introduction}, #{expertise}, #{certification}, #{rating}, #{consultationCount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE fortune_consultant SET rating = #{rating}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fortune_consultant SET consultation_count = consultation_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
